candidate_definition_hints.text: Efficient CPU/GPU ML Runtimes for VapourSynth (with built-in support for waifu2x, DPIR, RealESRGANv2/v3, Real-CUGAN, RIFE, SCUNet, ArtCNN and more!)
This project provides VapourSynth ML filter runtimes for a variety of platforms:
